title: Structure Editor
text: Structure Editor The Structure Editor enables you to define the contents of a main development object, including its sub objects. It is located in the central editing area of the Define Structure worksheet of main object editors, such as a Entity Editor and Component Editor. Typically, it displays a hierarchical table of the main object and all its sub-objects, as well as selected object properties. It enables you to add and delete development objects, and edit the listed properties. The properties displayed depend on the object being edited. How to To add objects to the main object structure, drag them from the Resource Browser and drop them on a valid target in the Structure Editor. You can also right-click and choose an Add or Insert option from the context menu. To delete sub-objects, select the object that you want to delete, right-click, and choose Delete . To edit a property, click the property value, enter a new value, and press Enter . Resize Columns Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
